requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN38.3 and Canadian TDG

summary.en: Transport Canada states that shipping and importing lithium batteries is subject to the Transportation of Dangerous Goods Act, 1992 and the TDG Regulations. Lithium ion batteries are Class 9 dangerous goods and may ship as UN3480 lithium ion batteries or UN3481 lithium ion batteries contained in or packed with equipment. Battery shipments must comply with classification, shipping document, dangerous goods marks, means of containment, training, and mode-specific requirements; air and marine shipments also interact with ICAO Technical Instructions and the IMDG Code. UN38.3 test summaries should cover the exact e-bike battery model and configuration before transport.
summary.zh: 加拿大交通部说明，锂电池的运输和进口受《1992年危险货物运输法》和TDG法规约束。锂离子电池属于第9类危险货物，可按UN3480锂离子电池或UN3481装在设备中/与设备包装在一起的锂离子电池运输。电池运输须符合分类、运输文件、危险货物标志、包装容器、培训及运输方式特定要求；空运和海运还涉及ICAO技术细则及IMDG规则。UN38.3测试摘要应覆盖实际运输的电动自行车电池具体型号和配置。
summary.zht: 加拿大交通部說明，鋰電池的運輸和進口受《1992年危險貨物運輸法》和TDG法規約束。鋰離子電池屬於第9類危險貨物，可按UN3480鋰離子電池或UN3481裝在設備中/與設備包裝在一起的鋰離子電池運輸。電池運輸須符合分類、運輸文件、危險貨物標誌、包裝容器、培訓及運輸方式特定要求；空運和海運還涉及ICAO技術細則及IMDG規則。UN38.3測試摘要應覆蓋實際運輸的電動自行車電池具體型號和配置。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 (UN38.3)
ICAO Technical Instructions and IMDG Code for air/marine shipments

gap.en: The Canada transport gap is usually documentation and shipment configuration rather than product design. Exporters must match the UN38.3 report to the exact battery model, chemistry, watt-hour rating, cell count, enclosure, and BMS; classify correctly as UN3480 or UN3481; use TDG-compliant labels, marks, shipping documents, and trained personnel; and keep documents aligned with whether the battery is installed in the e-bike, packed with it, or shipped separately. A China GB/T 36972 or factory battery safety report is not enough for TDG transport acceptance.
gap.zh: 加拿大运输差距通常是文件和出货配置问题，而非单纯产品设计问题。出口商须确保UN38.3报告与具体电池型号、化学体系、瓦时额定值、电芯数量、外壳和BMS一致；正确按UN3480或UN3481分类；使用符合TDG的标签、标志、运输文件和受训人员；并根据电池是安装在整车内、与整车同包还是单独运输保持文件一致。中国GB/T 36972或工厂电池安全报告不足以满足TDG运输接受要求。
gap.zht: 加拿大運輸差距通常是文件和出貨配置問題，而非單純產品設計問題。出口商須確保UN38.3報告與具體電池型號、化學體系、瓦時額定值、電芯數量、外殼和BMS一致；正確按UN3480或UN3481分類；使用符合TDG的標籤、標誌、運輸文件和受訓人員；並根據電池是安裝在整車內、與整車同包還是單獨運輸保持文件一致。中國GB/T 36972或工廠電池安全報告不足以滿足TDG運輸接受要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TDG Act/Regulations apply to lithium battery shipping and import; UN38.3 transport evidence is required by dangerous-goods transport regimes
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China export logistics normally require lithium battery dangerous-goods documentation including UN38.3 for regulated transport

source.publisher: Transport Canada — Transportation of Dangerous Goods

summary.en: Chinese battery suppliers commonly provide UN38.3 test summaries and MSDS/SDS documents for international shipment. Those documents can be useful in Canada if they are model-specific, current, and aligned with the actual shipment configuration, but they do not replace Canadian TDG classification, marking, documentation, and training obligations.
summary.zh: 中国电池供应商通常为国际运输提供UN38.3测试摘要和MSDS/SDS文件。若这些文件针对具体型号、保持有效且与实际出货配置一致，可用于加拿大运输；但不能替代加拿大TDG分类、标志、文件和培训义务。
summary.zht: 中國電池供應商通常為國際運輸提供UN38.3測試摘要和MSDS/SDS文件。若這些文件針對具體型號、保持有效且與實際出貨配置一致，可用於加拿大運輸；但不能替代加拿大TDG分類、標誌、文件和培訓義務。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — global lithium battery transport testing requirement
GB/T 36972-2018 — Lithium-ion batteries for electric bicycles (SAMR)
